final:
// // This module subtracts B from A when SUB is 0
module top_module(
  input [3:0] A,
  input [3:0] B,
  input SUB,
  output reg [3:0] out
);always @(*) begin
  if(SUB == 0) begin
    out <= A + B;
  end else begin
    out <= A - B;
  end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module subtracts B from A when SUB is 0
